promotionDelta: Implement and verify Interactive Grid mode only where cell-level navigation and editing justify the ARIA grid keyboard model.
Add column resize, reorder, pin or freeze, grouping, and aggregation.
Add multi-row and range selection where appropriate, bulk actions, expandable detail rows, and tree rows.
Add cell editing with validation, save and cancel, optimistic and pessimistic examples, and recoverable failures.
Add row and column virtualization without broken focus or aria-activedescendant references.
Add saved views and URL-state proof, permissions, and a responsive priority-column, row-detail, or item-view alternative.
Complete current scale, browser, visual, accessibility, lifecycle, clean-update, customized-update, conflict, rollback, and package/source parity evidence.
Complete independent Risk Class 3 keyboard, screen-reader, speech, switch, touch, zoom, and Windows forced-colors manual review before any Stable claim.
